sast_review.reason: urlopen is called with user-controlled xml_url without restricting allowed schemes; file:// or other schemes could be used.
ET.fromstring does not disable DTD/external entities by default; vulnerable to XXE attacks.
Importing xml.etree.ElementTree without defusedxml leaves the code vulnerable to XML attacks; confirms B314.
Bare except: pass silently swallows all exceptions, hiding errors and making debugging impossible.

raw.summary: The code is severely broken and insecure. It does not implement the required HTTP endpoint, authentication, CSRF protection, input validation, path resolution, atomic write, or proper error responses. It attempts to read from a file opened in write mode, uses an unsafe XML parser (XXE), has a bare except that silences all errors, and does not restrict URL schemes. Functionality is near zero and security is critically lacking.
